CustomField.description: True when NEPA_Phase2_Applicable__c = true. Requires a standalone environmental justice analysis section per 40 CFR 1508.1(m). This is separate from nepa_is_ej_comment__c (comment-level EJ flag) and nepa_tribal_lands_flag__c (GIS proximity trigger) — it is the Phase 2 documentation mandate applicable to all EA/EIS processes on or after May 1 2024.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: EJ analysis required under CEQ Phase 2 rule (40 CFR 1508.1(m)). Separate from the GIS EJ proximity gate.
CustomField.label: EJ Analysis Required (Phase 2)
